narrative: Israel and Hezbollah's shaky ceasefire agreement is likely to weigh on USD/JPY at the open, while a hawkish Fed and RBA outlooks collide, setting up AUD/USD for potential gains. EUR/USD closed Friday at 1.1469; ECB's hiking stance removes near-term downside risk, but Fed-ECB rate differential would pressure EUR/USD. USD/JPY closed Friday at 161.28, and is likely to extend gains on geopolitical risk premium.
